issues.description: Trigger value 'Trigger' is invalid. Must be one of: OnPlay, OnAttack, OnAttacked, OnKO, OnBlock, Counter, Activated, StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn

PlaySelf action is invalid in this context. Card cannot play itself from trash/hand via effect action. Verify official card text and use appropriate action (e.g., nothing if effect merely allows play, or clarify intended mechanic)
